programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, Terminal follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission (Max Irons & Dexter Fletcher), a teacher battling a fatal illness (Simon Pegg), an enigmatic janitor (Mike Myers)...

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Things go awry when car salesman Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) hires two thugs to kidnap his wife. Soon, the very pregnant and chipper Police Chief Marge Gunderson (Frances McDormand) takes the case. Is she up for the challenge? You betcha.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The most successful female tournament player takes dead aim on her first WPT championship.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Sparks fly in Northern California as the players takes aim at chip leader Kathy Liebert.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Vadim Trincher presses his relentless attacks in pursuit of the $730,000 first place prize.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The final table of the Foxwoods Poker Classic has come down to four players.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The biggest tournament of the year explodes on the Las Vegas strip.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT World Championship has come down to four players and one epic battle.

programme.title: The Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Under the inimitable direction of Robert Altman, Elliot Gould stars as the laid-back, legendary private eye Philip Marlowe investigating a mysterious murder. Also stars Sterling Hayden and Nina Van Pallandt.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: While The Rolling Stones rehearse 'Sympathy for the Devil' in the studio, Godard reflects on Society, politics and culture through five vignettes.

programme.title: Satan's School for Girls
programme.desc: A made-for-TV occult horror classic.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Bruce Lee: Way of the Dragon
programme.desc: A man visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: Open Water: Open Water
programme.desc: When a couple is stranded while scuba diving, they soon realize they are in the middle of shark-infested waters in this intense, critically acclaimed thriller.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: Multi-award winning actor Brian Cox plays reclusive Avery Ludlow, a small-town shop owner whose only reason for living is his dog, Red.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief (Morgan Freeman) recruits a younger crook (Antonio Banderas) to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Dead at 17
programme.desc: Jason and his friends find themselves in trouble when a girl they are partying with is accidentally killed. In a panic, they hide her body. Worried that he would confess, two of the boys kill Jason and make it look like a suicide.

programme.title: Multiverse
programme.desc: Four brilliant students unleash a parallel reality during a quantum experiment, confronting deadly versions of themselves. As identities blur and tensions rise, only one version can survive—triggering a violent battle for existence and reality itself.

programme.title: Narcopolis
programme.desc: In the near future, Frank Grieves is a new breed of police officer working in a city where all recreational drugs are legal. When he is taken off a case involving an unidentified corpse, he discovers that legalization has come at a price.

programme.title: Wizards Of The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: When evil screams throughout the world. When all the galaxies converge. When all that's fair and fine seems lost. A Hero will emerge.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Top of the World
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and Duane to work things out. Hay River rampie Tyler is on the fast track to a co-pilot seat, but first has to prove his flying ability to Buffalo's new chief pilot, Justin.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes. Larry, a rookie rampie, makes a near fatal error while training on the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract. Young DC-3 co-pilot Graeme sees his chance to move up to a bigger plane disappear when he falls out of favour with Joe.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46. New co-pilot Tyler faces the ultimate test - flying the sked with Joe.

programme.title: The Human Centipede III (Final Sequence)
programme.desc: An insane prison warden and his sidekick hatch a plan to simultaneously cut costs and deter prisoner revolt in their overpopulated, underfunded jail

programme.title: The Devil Below
programme.desc: A group of four amateur adventurers who specialize in exploring remote and forsaken places pay a visit to Shookum Hills, a town in the remote Appalachian Mountains, which was abandoned decades ago due to a mysterious coal mine fire.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis stars in this adaptation of Stephen King's classic tale of horror. Carrie White has been cursed with the power of telekinesis and when her tormenters commit an act of unforgivable humiliation, they'll soon learn a deadly lesson.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense
programme.desc: Colonel March's niece, a believer in spiritualism, hears her dead husband's voice and becomes convinced he has returned as a ghost; but has he?

programme.title: 1986 FIFA World Cup

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 2
programme.desc: Starting on the Isle of Lewis in the Outer Hebrides, witness the 5,000-year-old standing stones of Callanish, traditional Scottish blackhouses, and cut peat with a modern crofter.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure begins in Staffordshire, England, where the onset of a violent storm announced the discovery of the largest Anglo-Saxon hoard ever uncovered. But was the storm an omen of things to come?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins in the Hell Creek Formation of South Dakota, with one of the greatest palaeontology discoveries ever made. However, the find brought nothing but trouble and suspicion to those who uncovered it.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins not with diamonds and gold, but with skin and bone, unearthed in the dangerous wilds of Russia's arctic Yamal Peninsula. But was this ice-age discovery doomed?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt starts in Turin with the controversial Shroud, moves to Ice Age Spain and a fraud-tainted discovery, then to Manchester where a statue seems to move and ends with the cursed blue diamond tied to misery and bloodshed.

programme.title: Mirror Images II
programme.desc: A woman (Shannon Whirry) hires a private investigator (Tom Reilly) to probe the mysterious death of her identical twin.

programme.title: Can You Keep It Up for A Week?
programme.desc: Annette promises to marry her boyfriend on the condition he keeps his hands off other women and holds down a proper job for seven days. If he fails, he has to march up to Buckingham Palace stark-naked!

programme.title: Siren's Kiss
programme.desc: A painter has serious creative block. He decides that two nude models living in his house might help. His wife objects, or does she?

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Diana's hoarding became so extreme that her daughter was forced to sleep in a recliner. Meanwhile, Dolores has accumulated a truly dangerous hoard.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Obsessive Michelle's 60 pet birds and five-foot piles of junk have chased her husband from the house. She must clean her house, clear her mind, and bring her husband home.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Richard can't refuse a bargain and his home is brimming with clearance items. Plus, Barbara reveals how her hoarding problem grew after losing her two sons.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Linda's hoard of junk is so difficult to navigate around, her diabetic husband often finds himself trapped upstairs without food or water. Meanwhile, Dawn's habit is about to cost her a fortune.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Ruthann promised her cousin that she would turn their historic house into a bed and breakfast. But her cat and antiques hoarding has put that dream on hold.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: The inside of Robin's house can be smelt from the street and the authorities are threatening to demolish it, leaving her with a bill for £30,000. Meanwhile, hoarder Ken could be facing time in jail.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A pro baseball team visits Evergreen Forest and seeks a new player. Bert and Cedric both compete for the spot, straining their friendship as rivalry grows. In the end, they must decide what matters more, success or their bond.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril offers Bert a deal to become the face of his new cologne line. Tempted by fame and money, Bert considers the offer, but soon realizes the cost of endorsing Cyril’s schemes and must choose between integrity and success.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril panics when his betrayed partner Karl Snarl returns for revenge. Meanwhile, Bert discovers an old helicopter, and Melissa must overcome her fear of heights to help save her friends during a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After losing power due to unpaid bills, Cyril plans to build a dam to control energy in the forest. Meanwhile, Bert and Cedric stay with Aunt Gertie, whose strict ways test their patience while bigger trouble brews outside.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cousin Bentley visits the Raccoons, bringing his usual quirks along. Meanwhile, Cyril seeks to regain his youth using a questionable potion, leading to chaos as his reckless attempt causes unexpected and humorous consequences.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Melissa explore echo caverns and discover strange cave art. Cyril, seeing profit potential, enters the art world and drives up prices. The gang must decide whether art is about value or meaning as greed takes over.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Believing Cyril is dying, Bert spends his savings on a tribute monument. When Cyril learns he is fine, he exploits the situation to sabotage the Evergreen Standard, forcing Bert to recover from his costly mistake quickly.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Cedric meet a hermit living in a swamp rumored to hold oil. Cyril attempts to buy the land, threatening the hermit’s home. The gang must protect the swamp and prove its worth beyond the profit Cyril seeks.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A misunderstanding leads everyone to believe Cyril is marrying Lady Baden-Baden. Cedric questions his past while Mr. Knox hides his feelings for her. As confusion grows, truths come out and relationships are tested.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs invent a time machine, which Cyril uses to alter past events for personal gain. However, his meddling causes chaos in the present, forcing the gang to fix the timeline before things spiral completely out of control.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The buyers press their luck in Sin City where Brandon and Lori get outfoxed by a group of locals with a questionable strategy. Then, Jesse gambles on a locker filled with junk. Everyone thinks he's crazy, but he knows something they don't.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse taunts Brandon and Lori in the hopes of instigating a fight and later unearths a ticking treasure. Then, seasoned local Victor throws down his bankroll for a trove of luxury goods, but are they actually knock-offs?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori return to Boston and square off against his former protégé Wade. The bad blood may just erupt into a full-out brawl on the auction floor. A former military hero goes all in on a locker that turns out to be hiding the ultimate score.

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Family Connections

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Post Partum

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Man Who Shot Trotsky

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Thanksgiving in Hawaii (Part II)

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Jill Dando
programme.desc: Documentary examining the unsolved murder of British TV presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot outside her house in Fulham, London, in 1999.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.desc: There is an immediate fallout after Josh and Robyn switch teams. Robyn is embraced, but Josh clashes with Elise. The next day, the chefs compete in an outdoor plank cooking challenge. Josh nearly smothers his team's fire and the red team loses.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.desc: Both teams replicate six Hell's Kitchen entrées while kicking chefs out of the kitchen until only one remains. Chef Ramsay holds a "Cook For Your Life" challenge. Robyn, Giovanni, Milly, Barbie, Manda, and Elise must recreate his signature dish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Elise and Michelle get into a heated argument that carries over into the next day. In the challenge, the chefs toss fish to collect ingredients. While Barbie annoys her team in punishment, the blue team heads to Vegas for a night of revelry.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Nine all-star chefs compete in a blind taste test challenge, in which they must identify herbs and spices with smashing consequences for their teammates. While one chef guesses, one chef sits in the hot seat and is hit with a mashed potato cannon.

programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.desc: An ambitious TV commentator (Mort Sahl) is determined to prove the guilt of a widow (Dana Wynter) exonerated by a jury.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: A Safe Place

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession

programme.title: Cold Blood: An Angel Taken

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: In Cold Blood

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Til Death Do Us Part

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Mystery of Disembodied Feet
programme.desc: The summer of 2007, a young girl walks on the beach and a human foot in a sneaker. Less than a week later, a couple discovers another running shoe with a foot inside of it south of there. Thus begins the mystery of the disembodied feet.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Abbotsford Killer
programme.desc: Two girls are attacked by a man armed with a baseball bat. One of them manages to escape but the second one is found in a salmon river. The killer nags the police for months until he leaves behind a telling clue.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Left At The Scene
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Partners In Crime
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Second Case

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Baby

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the 1960s we too our first steps into a vast new realm—bound for the Moon. But NASA astronauts would soon find they weren’t the only ones out there.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Cassie & Steve

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Anthony & Marq

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After Jonathon's online love disappears, he enlists Nev and Max to help track him down. But when the guys discover a former catfish is involved, they begin to suspect Jonathon himself. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What on Earth are they spraying? Richard travels into the field to meet several researchers who present compelling evidence that chemicals or biological agents are being deliberately sprayed into the atmosphere by some shadowy government agency.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: This is the tragic tale of Susan Smith, who shocked the nation in 1994 by fabricating a carjacking to cover up the drowning murders of her two young sons.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia
programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz visits the volcano that stopped air travel in 2010; predicting probabilities in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: Martian Attractions
programme.desc: The Latest in Martian exploration from orbit and on the ground, new sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on to the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: Boom, Bust and Blood
programme.desc: Chris Tarrant explores how railways transformed the nation.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: How the Railways Won the War
programme.desc: The crucial roles the railways played in the two world wars.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: Steam Is Dead, Long Live the Railways
programme.desc: The dying days of steam, and how the railways fought back.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 1
programme.desc: Heading out to the Med and the Black Sea, the 280 men and women onboard face a heart attack, a man overboard, and a show of force from Russian airplanes.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea
programme.desc: The ship and its crew are heading towards Crimea, when a Russian ship HMS Duncan has been tracking suddenly disappears. As they get closer to Crimea, the situation escalates

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reports that a chemical weapon has been used in Salisbury changes the mood. When another chemical attack takes place in Syria, the ship goes to action stations for the first time.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Thailand
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Punjab, India
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: Arthur: When Duty Calls – Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: Ladonna finds out the Army is transferring her dad to Oregon, and the whole Compson family is moving again. Fern and the others can tell Ladonna is upset, but don’t know how to help. What can they do to make the transition easier?

programme.title: Arthur: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry
programme.desc: Prunella's loves doing yoga with her mom, but when her best friend joins them, will she be able to share her time? When Arthur decides to take on The Brain at a checkers competition, everyone rallies behind the underdog.

programme.title: Arthur: He Said, He Said/Bunny Trouble
programme.desc: A special episode of Bionic Bunny is interrupted, and Arthur and friends try to remember what comes next. D.W. is excited to be taking care of the class bunny, Larry. But Larry is feeling adventurous and and wanders off.

programme.title: Arthur: Baseball Blues/Brain's Biggest Blunder
programme.desc: It's Grebelings season and George can't wait to play! After all, no one knows more about baseball than George. Then, wBrain gets teamed with Buster and Binky in the annual Arithmattack competition.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order
programme.desc: D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/Kidonia
programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard was the first branch of the US military to see action in WWII.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II
programme.desc: The US Coast Guard saw extensive action throughout the Second World War, battling U-boats within sight of mainland America.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Lost Tanks of D-Day
programme.desc: In Normandy, June 6, 1944, a dozen Sherman tanks equipped with floats, the famous Duplex Drives (DD), leave their ship to swim to Omaha Beach... not all of them make it.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Last Flight of the B-17
programme.desc: Twenty-six metres beneath the waves at the foot of the majestic Calvi Citadel in Corsica lies an American plane from the Second World War.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: Secret Bunkers of Omaha Beach
programme.desc: On June 6th 1944, Lieutenant-colonel Rudder’s Rangers company climbs the cliffs of the Pointe du Hoc in Normandy with the mission to destroy the German cannons.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: In Stealth we examine the methods ships have used to evade detection. With the advent of radar in WW2, ships that wanted to remain undetected had to find ways to hide.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: The End Game
programme.desc: WATU faces a crucial encounter for ONS.5 in the Battle of the Atlantic. Dönitz unleashes the new torpedo that targets the escort ships. Roberts and Laidlaw must counteract the new weapon and recapture the waves.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Discover the true story of a German Luftwaffe pilot in World War II who risked his own life to save the crew of an American B-17 bomber.

programme.desc: Deceit and Delusion 1923-1928: Hitler appears to be eliminated after his failed putsch in 1923. Discover how the Nazi movement used democracy's tolerance in Germany to come back.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: World War Weird

programme.title: Married to Medicine

programme.title: Married to Medicine

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis lands a listing with a former broker who helped him launch his career; Fredrik struggles to sell a $30 billion penthouse in Tribeca; Ryan tries to save his skin after showing too much of someone else's in a marketing campaign.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A crazy golf course in Spain is doing a roaring trade, and a couple from Halifax plan a big event at their bed & breakfast. In France, an Anglo-French restaurant opens, and a couple from Southend test out paragliding.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.desc: April is covering the showing of the world-famed Duchess Diamond. Krang wants the diamond, a flawless stone, to focus the rays on his laser dimension blade.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Northern Lights Out
programme.desc: Eric Red seizes both April and Professor Swenson's map to the underground volcanoes in Scandinavia to tap into the molten energy and melt the polar ice caps.

programme.desc: The Turtles are in England, when they are taken back to the past, via an experimental atomic clock and must team up with Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson in order to get the clock back and return to the present.

programme.desc: Splinter's ancient sensei, Master Mogo-San, arrives from Japan, seeking to find his grandson, to hand him a precious family heirloom - a sacred white ninja belt.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Rogues

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a group of astronauts returning to Earth after an expedition to Mars discovers what appears to be a dangerous alien life form on their ship, they must decide whether to return to Earth or sacrifice themselves for the sake of all humanity?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Jennifer (Marlee Matlin), deaf since birth, has had a revolutionary implant in her ear, to help her hear for the first time. The device doesn't help her to hear normal conversation and sounds, but she does hear...something…from The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a robot named Adam is accused of killing his own creator, it's up to a civil liberties attorney (Leonard Nimoy) to defend him. Is Adam capable of murder? Or did a military retrofit of the docile robot turn him into a ruthless killing machine?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: An environmentally friendly U.S. Senator's life changes when, after a freak accident, he suddenly starts to believe he is an alien in disguise, with a mission to surreptitiously reconfigure the Earth's atmosphere. But is it for the better?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.desc: While working on a high-stakes gun raid, Andy and Gail stumble upon a victim of domestic abuse whose brutal experience in the system has taught her not to trust the police.

programme.title: JAG: Rendevous

programme.title: JAG: Ghost Ship

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us

programme.desc: Transformers explodes in popularity, but Hasbro sidelines Marvel Comics and kills Optimus Prime to launch new toys—a gamble that could redefine the franchise for better or worse.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Abbotsford Killer

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Following the gruesome discovery of a skeleton transported by water on an island, several detectives are challenged as they seek to unravel the unsolved mystery of the woman with no name.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer
programme.desc: Investigators find the parallels between the two cases troubling: two young, isolated and vulnerable Guyanese women, two deaths in strange circumstances, two life insurance policies. Will Mohammed Khan escape justice again?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Bathtub Sisters
programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Family Plots
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip

programme.desc: A tourist takes a photo of vultures in Joshua Tree National Park and inadvertently discovers a gruesome homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: DNA on one of two teenage girls killed in a similar fashion on a California beach six years apart leads investigators to a suspect who worked inside the police department.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Don Most takes on the apparition who haunts his girlfriend's home. Gena Lee Nolin is confronted by a murdered spirit when it appears during a violent exorcism.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did The Babysitter Abuse My Child?
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Monique’s friend claims that Adrian advertised himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Then, pregnant Tyeasha suspects David of cheating on her with men. What will the polygraph say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An abandoned baby is kidnapped and the detectives must find the baby and his father.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Royal Murder
programme.desc: As payment for solving a case, Holmes and Watson are invited to spend a weekend at an estate in the Balkans.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death
programme.desc: During WWII, several murders occur at a convalescent home where Dr. Watson has volunteered his services. Holmes is summoned to solve the crime from a long list of suspects including the owners, staff, and the patients.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Eiffel Tower
programme.desc: After a famous criminal is run over and killed by a milk wagon, Insp. Lestrade finds a mysterious coded note in the man's clothing.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson investigate the legend of a supernatural hound, a beast that may be stalking a young heir on the fog-shrouded moorland that makes up his estate.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Four all-star chefs compete against each other in a holiday dish challenge judged by visiting family members. With a tie declared, Chef Ramsay steps in to crown the winner of a lunch at Saddle Peak Lodge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay announces that Nick, Michelle and Benjamin must design and cook a five-course menu. After tasting them, he announces that all three finalists will move forward.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Michelle and Benjamin compete to be the winner of the first ever Hell's Kitchen all-stars, and the head chef at Gordon Ramsay's Hell's Kitchen Restaurant at Caesar's Palace in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Chef Ramsay has relocated 'Hell's Kitchen' to Las Vegas, to find out who will be the next head chef at the brand-new Hell's Kitchen restaurant in beautiful Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs take on a shrimp challenge in which one hopeful makes a grave error, before a tough opening service for both teams. With Lisa Vanderpump and Wayne Brady in the VIP booths, the pressure is on.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The day begins with a Caesar salad challenge. As service begins, Olympic gold medallist Apolo Ohno and NFL star Marshall Faulk take the VIP seats.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of murdered Christchurch scrap-metal dealer, John Reynolds, to discover his killer and reveal the truth surrounding the violent attack.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Sloss Furnaces
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Alabama to investigate Sloss Furnaces, a 50-acre industrial plantoperating from 1882 until the 1970s.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: TAPS Meets the Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: The Ghost Hunters enlist the help of Bravo's The Real Housewives of Atlanta as they embark on this week's investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghosts of Christmas Past
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS gets intothe Christmas spirit at New Hampshire's Christmas Farm Inn.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Town
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates the entire town of Alexandria, Louisiana, where paranormal activity seems to lurk around every corner.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pennsylvania Asylum
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Chester County, Pennsylvania to investigate the Pennhurst Asylum.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Century of Haunting
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Oxford, Massachusetts to help a family in need. The house has been in the Voas family for two generations, and lots of activity has been reported, from apparitions to shadow figures.

programme.title: Moesha: Cold Busted
programme.desc: Mo invites Q over when she thinks the whole family is away for the day. However, they return home early and Mo and Q are caught.

programme.title: Moesha: Prom Fright
programme.desc: Mo agrees to go to another school’s prom with the son of Frank’s friend so she will no longer be busted.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big College Admission Episode
programme.desc: After years of claiming to be nothing more than friends, Spencer and Mona are shocked when Spencer’s cousin Chauncey is hired at Delicious Records and recalls the night in college when he caught Mona and Spencer having drunken sex

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Bitter Baby Shower Episode
programme.desc: Big Dee Dee’s baby shower turns cold when Mona feels her confidence has been betrayed after learning that Dee Dee has told her cousin Barbara (guest star Shari Headley) that Mona’s relationship problems stem from her mother’s bitterness

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big How The Ex Stole Christmas Episode
programme.desc: When Dee Dee’s ex-boyfriend comes over for the family holiday dinner, he announces that he is getting married, and Mona warns Dee Dee against an effort to win him back

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Double Date With My Mate Episode
programme.desc: When Mona gets set up on a date with Camille’s best friend Carlo (guest star Antonio Sabato Jr.), she is taken by his charm and good looks until he admits he’s actually in love with Camille

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big 'you're Not The Boss Of Me' Episode
programme.desc: When an uptight new boss (guest star MC Lyte) does some downsizing at Delicious Records, Mona and Spencer struggle to impress her and keep their jobs

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Love Is Here & Now You're Gone Episode
programme.desc: When Camille returns from a trip home to London, she contemplates leaving America and Spencer forever

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big I Haven't The Vegas Idea Episode
programme.desc: When Dee Dee’s formerly overweight childhood friend, Aurora, shows up with a sexy new physique, the rebounding Spencer whisks her off for a wild night in Las Vegas, but when they awake the next morning, they believe that they may have gotten married

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Labor Of Love Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee becomes hysterical when her mother goes into labor, while Mona remains calm; a motivational speaker (Evan Marriott) influences Charles.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Good Help Is Hard To Fire Episode

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: Ever since Wes and his family moved into their new home in York, PA they've been struggling with a dark force that's made everyday a living hell. Wes feels his mental and physical health is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Intervention
programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: Yvette and her team take on their largest investigation to date. They have been invited to investigate a large estate where it seems just about every building has a ghostly tale.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24

programme.title: Most Haunted S24

programme.title: Most Haunted S24

programme.desc: The IMF team must rescue a U.S. intelligence operative who has top-secret military plans on a microcircuit chip.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Traitor

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Psychic
programme.desc: The team must trick a crooked investment promoter into endorsing $80 million in stolen stocks and then getting them back from him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Survivors

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trek
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force matches wits with a hijacker and a disloyal prison commandant.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Brew-Phoria
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go all in for an electric car, but with the batteries missing, a pricey refurb is their only shot at a profit. Will a home brewing system and high-end air rifles help soften the blow, or will they take a big loss?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Got Served
programme.desc: After a crushing defeat, the guys leave an auction empty handed and scramble to find new merchandise at a yard sale. But questionable antique tennis rackets and an ancient special effects box may not earn them a cent.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Whittier gets ugly when a buyer named Big Dave tries to take it all. After some tough losses, the guys win a state of the art food truck and an off-road rock crawler with dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer
programme.desc: A last-minute auction in Norwalk proves challenging when Ton and Allen go toe-to-toe with a real life cowboy couple. When the dust settles, the guys uncover a 3D printer and a grappling hook gun they can't wait to shoot.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
programme.desc: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind and bid based on spite rather than strategy. And a gatling gun & suit of armor are worth much less than the guys expected.

programme.desc: A man encounters spirits in his dreams, and a teen deals with demonic messages.

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a college freshman goes missing without a trace, concerned friends and family talk to police about his last whereabouts. Those conversations, however, raise more questions than answers when they point to a potentially deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard-working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a teen disappears, her family joins forces with the police to find her. But hopes of finding her alive quickly diminish when an alarming lead comes to light.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Sean Vincent Gillis from Louisiana was arrested on suspicion of killing five women, but during police questioning, he ultimately confessed to the brutal murders of three more people.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A crazed cab driver goes on a seven-hour shooting spree, killing six people and critically injuring two.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Police suspect that a mother of two has relapsed into drugs when she disappears, but her family and friend suspect foul play.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.desc: When Faye and Marian Caliman first met, she was bowled over by his gentlemanly ways. He was the life and soul of family parties. But when the marriage turned sour, Faye and her family realised Marian was not the true gent he’d always pretended.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Afterlife Investigations
programme.desc: Narrated by Britain's leading investigative Journalist - Donal MacIntyre - this award winning film presents four never before seen scientific investigations into life after death.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Mysterious Stone Monuments of Markawasi Peru
programme.desc: Travel high into the Peruvian Andes to explore the strange, wondrous and unexplained mysteries of stone formations that may have been carved by thousands of years of erosion -- or the hands of a long-dead civilization

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Water
programme.desc: In this episode, George investigates the wild side of water in dangerous class 5 river rapids, a flooded cave, and even in the ocean surrounded by massive Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reports that a chemical weapon has been used in Salisbury changes the mood. When another chemical attack takes place in Syria, the ship goes to action stations for the first time.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 4

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top

programme.desc: Fern has writer's block! Fortunately, Ladonna's full of stories, and Fern decides to "borrow" the tales and simply change the names. Then, when Sue Ellen decides to stop eating meat, Muffy and Francine compete to be the best vegetarian.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Thinks Big/Arthur Cleans Up

programme.title: Arthur: Hide And Snake/Muffy's New Best Friend

programme.desc: With a bar full of customers, a couple of twenty-somethings battle with a dodgy pizza oven, a Menorcan diving school is left high and dry as their boat breaks down, and two gite owners in France receive a surprise glamorous booking.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: After 20 months of renovations, two gite owners open for business in France, a Menorcan diving school deals with a very nervous customer, and there’s a life changing event for two young bar owners on the Costa del Sol.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Adventures of Sherlock Mario

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Freddie has everything--a gorgeous new husband and half ownership of a winery. But when her business partner's wife is murdered, Freddi suspects her partner's new love.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton Voyage
